advisory: City marathon. Hauptstraße and Marktplatz closed 7:00-14:00. Buses 1, 4, and 7 are rerouted. Take the long way around through Lindenstraße if you must travel.
Roadworks on Bahnhofstraße between Schillerplatz and the train station. Pavement is uneven — be careful walking.
Light rain expected in the morning. Take an umbrella.
